feature_flag_behavior.false: Parcel Discovery continues to use public/intelligence/parcel-search-index.json and local filtering.
feature_flag_behavior.true: Search queries of three or more characters request GET /parcels/search and normalize the response into the existing ParcelSearchRecord UI shape.
feature_flag_behavior.short_queries: Queries shorter than three characters continue using the generated static search index.

fallback_behavior.api_failure: Falls back to existing static parcel-search-index.json behavior.
fallback_behavior.api_timeout: Falls back to existing static parcel-search-index.json behavior.
fallback_behavior.invalid_shape: Adapter throws a safe error and the panel falls back to static results.
fallback_behavior.status_indicator: Parcel Discovery badge can show FastAPI, API search, Static Index, or Static fallback.

remaining_static_dependencies: client-side subdivision, neighborhood, and governance warning filters

validation.flag_true_browser_smoke: partial: flag-on app opened and input enabled; browser automation did not reliably dispatch React input events, so endpoint usage was verified by direct backend request
